name: 福帮手
description: Fbsir connector for activation, entitlements, points, lebao, identity, scene packs, and Family IP Partner workflows.
description_zh: 福帮手生态连接器：访问码激活、权益预检、积分、乐包兑换/状态、身份、场景包查询，并支持福帮手·家族IP合伙人无注册乐包闭环。
description_en: Fbsir connector for activation, entitlements, points, lebao vouchers, identity and scene packs.
examples_zh: 帮我用访问码 FBS-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX 激活 iplib-core
查看我当前的积分余额和权益列表
先确认我当前是领取、激活还是继续，再处理待归并乐包
查询我的乐包兑换状态和已解锁权益
按 skill_whoami 返回的 packCode 查询场景包内容快照
examples_en: Activate access code FBS-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX for iplib-core
Check my current points balance and entitlements
Check whether I should claim, activate, or continue before handling a pending lebao
Check my lebao redemption status and unlocked entitlements
Query a scene-pack snapshot with the packCode returned by skill_whoami
